case_title: EDAIS, MOHAMAD vs. CURTIS, WILLIE C et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDAIS, MOHAMAD AS TO DEFENDANT CURTIS, WILLIE C DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDAIS, MOHAMAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CURTIS, WILLIE C THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5005 3RD STREET #1 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,850.00 RENT, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,100.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COST INCLUDES ATTORNEY FEES. STAY EXECUTION AND WRIT CON- DITIONED ON DEFT. PAYMENT OF DAMAGES, COST AND ATTY FEES TOTAL OF $3,100.00 PLUS INTEREST OF 5% PER ANNUM. DEFT. PAY $150.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING 3/1/94 ON ARREARAGES AND SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR FURHTER DETAILS AND CONDITIONS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
